strategy: B (end_stream=false, is_http2=2, JSON Patch NDJSON + streaming)

ui_response.ui_state: 제작 중 (generating) - stuck indefinitely, no text rendered

key_observations: getInferenceTranscriptsForUser: first call 200 (0.4kB), second call FAILED (0.0kB, 34.98s timeout)
network_analysis.inference_endpoint_behavior: First getInferenceTranscript returned 200 with small payload (0.4kB), subsequent calls failed with timeout

diagnosis.pattern: Etap appears to intercept the inference request, but Strategy B streaming response causes Notion to enter permanent 'generating' state without rendering any text
diagnosis.comparison_with_163: Similar to #163 - NDJSON format acknowledged but streaming delivery issue persists. Strategy B (end_stream=false) keeps connection open, Notion waits indefinitely for more data
diagnosis.likely_cause: end_stream=false with is_http2=2 sends response but never signals completion, causing Notion frontend to remain in 'generating' state
action_needed: Consider end_stream=true to properly close the stream after warning delivery
Or adjust NDJSON chunk format to include a completion signal that Notion recognizes
Check if Notion expects a specific 'done' message in the NDJSON stream to exit generating state
